name: cassette
description: Operate Cassette instances from Codex through the installed Cassette CLI and repo-local skills.

interface.longDescription: Manage Cassette infrastructure from Codex using the installed Cassette CLI and repo-local skills for instances, logs, metrics, backups, schedules, containers, and SSH key workflows.
defaultPrompt: List my Cassette instances and summarize their health.
Show recent logs and metrics for a Cassette instance.
Create a backup or schedule a reboot for an instance.
